title: rubus × intercedentiformis
intro: Rubus × intercedentiformis, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry, is a hybrid species of raspberry native to the Himalayan region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation due to its high content of anthocyanins, flavonoids, and ellagic acid. The health benefits of Rubus × intercedentiformis include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help in reducing the risk of certain diseases, such as heart disease and cancer. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried powder, and is often consumed in herbal supplements and jams to utilize its medicinal and health benefits.
